profile.bio: A Full-Stack Developer and AI Builder specializing in Next.js, TypeScript, and Firebase. Currently pursuing a Bachelor's degree in Information & Communication Technology at the University of Ruhuna, Sri Lanka. Passionate about building AI-powered applications, cloud solutions, and real-time systems. Certified in Web Development, Responsive Web Design, AI Agent Building, and multiple Microsoft & AWS technologies.

experience.description: Gained practical exposure to technology solutions during a 6-month traineeship. Worked with tools including Postman API and Large Language Models (LLM), contributing to technological innovation and digital solutions.

Represented the batch as the primary ICT liaison between students and faculty. Coordinated ICT-related announcements, updates, and communications within the batch. Supported classmates with technology-related concerns and participated in batch meetings to convey ICT matters to relevant parties.

projects.title: NexEra – Full-Stack Academic Learning Platform
projects.description: A full-stack academic learning platform built for university students to access, organize, and interact with study materials — including Markdown notes, PDFs, and quizzes — all in one place.
projects.problem: University students lacked a centralized, organized platform to access study materials, take quizzes, and track their academic progress across subjects.
projects.solution: Built NexEra with a Markdown notes system, PDF viewer, real-time quiz engine with auto-save, an admin dashboard for role-based content management, and full mobile responsiveness.
projects.result: A production-ready academic platform with Firebase-backed server caching, cross-device sync, and Light/Dark/Contrast theme switching — actively serving university students.

projects.title: Birthday Post Creator
projects.description: A professional web application that automates birthday post creation for the university student union's social media channels, reducing a 30-minute manual process to under 2 minutes.
projects.problem: The student media team spent hours creating individualized birthday posts using traditional design software, resulting in inconsistent quality and bottlenecks during busy periods.
projects.solution: Built a custom web app with multiple professional templates, a Canvas-based image editor with zoom/crop/rotate, AI-powered message generation, and one-click HD export at 1080x1350px.
projects.result: Reduced post creation time by 95%. Generated 50+ professional posts in the first month with 100% design consistency. Deployed officially to 15+ student union members of the 9th Batch.

projects.title: AI Question Generator (Q-Gen)
projects.description: An AI-powered platform that generates contextual questions from course materials and provides automated evaluation with detailed feedback. Perfect for exam preparation and self-assessment.
projects.problem: Students lacked an intelligent tool to generate practice questions from their study materials and receive instant, personalized feedback on their answers.
projects.solution: Built Q-Gen with unlimited question generation, AI-powered 1–5 star evaluation, personalized feedback, and a multi-provider API rotation system (Groq + OpenRouter) for 99.9% uptime at zero cost.
projects.result: Achieved 99.9% uptime via multi-key rotation across 3+ API keys with 10x more free tokens — supporting Computer Networks, Programming, and Information Systems subjects.

projects.title: AI Math Solver
projects.description: A personal AI-powered math solver supporting image upload with OCR text extraction, step-by-step solutions, and multi-type math support including Algebra, Calculus, Trigonometry, and more.
projects.problem: Needed a personal tool to solve complex math problems with step-by-step explanations, including support for handwritten problems via image upload.
projects.solution: Built a solver with Tesseract.js OCR for image-to-text extraction, Groq AI for step-by-step solutions, custom math symbol keyboards, and a multi-key API rotation system for 40,000+ free requests/day.
projects.result: Achieved 40,000+ free requests/day combining multiple API keys. 99% uptime during testing at $0 cost. Great learning experience in distributed systems and AI integration.

projects.title: DevelopME – Real-Time Messaging Platform
projects.description: A real-time messaging platform built from scratch to demonstrate full-stack development skills, covering backend logic, database design, and frontend interaction.
projects.problem: Needed a hands-on full-stack project to demonstrate real-time communication, secure authentication, and role-based access control using core web technologies.
projects.solution: Built DevelopME with real-time AJAX messaging, hashed password authentication, cookie-based sessions, role-based access (Owner/Admin/User), admin moderation dashboard, and server maintenance mode.
projects.result: A fully functional real-time messaging platform deployed at developme.mywebcommunity.org, demonstrating end-to-end full-stack skills with responsive design across all devices.

projects.title: Digital Voting System (DVS)
projects.description: A comprehensive console-based election voting system built in C that simulates Sri Lanka's parliamentary election process, developed as a university project.
projects.problem: University assignment requiring a secure, functional voting simulation that mirrors real-world parliamentary election processes.
projects.solution: Built a C console application featuring secure voter registration, multi-party candidate selection, and real-time results tracking.
projects.result: Successfully completed as a university project demonstrating core systems programming skills in C, including file management and console application design.
